insights.commentary: US): PLUS provides IT solutions to SMB, corporations, and governments. We shorted the company in the past. PLUS generates ~40% of its revenue from CSCO networking products. We believed a recovery in CSCO’s networking business would drive upside that was not reflected in consensus expectations.

insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to +5.5% to +35.4% YoY (baseline median -0.9% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Operating margin decelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating margin growth moved from +10.7% to +10.5% YoY in the latest quarter. Trailing-twelve-month growth does not yet confirm. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
